name: using the shipped standard profile as the enforcement config preserves the native baseline: a privileged pod still blocks with nothing disabled
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/standard.yaml" 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && grep -q 'disabled=0' e.txt && echo standard-is-default-preserving 1>&2
